mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement-where you deserve it all, and then some! Because you're worth it, right?" 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my favorite caf, ready to indulge in my daily dose of expensive lattes and avocado toast. As I approached the counter, a faint whisper caught my attention. "Excuse me, sir, are you Hot Josh?" a timid voice inquired. Naturally, I straightened my posture and flashed my patented Hot Josh smile, confirming the stranger's suspicions with a nod.To my utter shock, the barista behind the counter began to tremble with excitement. "It's really you! Hot Josh!" she squealed, causing a ripple of attention throughout the caf. Customers whispered and pointed in my direction, and for a moment, I basked in the glorious spotlight of my own magnificence.Now, here's where the entitlement truly kicks in. The barista, her eyes wide with adoration, offered to make me the most lavish, over-the-top latte on the house. As if I, Hot Josh, should settle for anything less! I leaned in, my voice dripping with entitlement, and declared, "I don't just want a free latte. I want a free latte with gold flakes, diamond sprinkles, and a side of imported truffles. And make it quick-I have an empire to run."The barista, taken aback by my audacity, scurried to comply with my demands. Minutes later, a masterpiece of a drink was placed before me, shimmering and sparkling like a beverage fit for royalty. As I took my first sip, a wave of satisfaction washed over me. Yes, I had truly outdone myself this time.And that, my dear friends, is how Hot Josh always gets what he wants-because entitlement isn't just a mindset; it's a way of life.
